channel.title: Logs on Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content in Logs on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 08
item.description: Challenge Tasks Day8 (July 11, 2022) kokoa clone #6 (2/2) - start cloning app, ideation for final result :) kokoa Challenge assignment React challenge quiz React #4, 5 review review… posting a blog Overview I have some companies want to work with in mind, both are related to politics and media. First one is OXOPolitics which is political SNS, and another is ALookSo which is media startup for sharing different viewpoints.

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 07
item.description: Challenge Tasks Day7 (July 10, 2022) kokoa clone #6 (1/2) - start cloning app, ideation for final result :) Challenge assignment React #4, 5 recap posting a blog Overview assignment are getting complex, and React challenge is also starting. need to make some more time slots for these but I’m not sure how the next week’s at work are going to be. Today I learned (reviewed) HTML, CSS overall Resources kokoa clone #6 React JS

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 06
item.description: Challenge Tasks Day6 (July 9, 2022) kokoa clone #4.0 ~ #4.6, #5 Challenge assignment posting a blog React #5 Overview Reviewing react tutorial to understand the concepts and practice coding before things are getting complex. Finished HTML and CSS concepts, will start actually making something tomorrow. planning to breakdown creative coding tutorials and just thinking about learning threeJS and project ideas as well. I think I want to build my career path as engineer for visual elements.

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 05
item.description: Challenge Tasks Day5 (July 8, 2022) kokoa clone #3.12 ~ #3.19 Challenge assignment posting a blog React #3, #4 Overview learning process is quite slow recently as I’m not focusing on neither my job and side works. Thought that I have to focus on myself than a job. Actually I’ve been lost my interest on what I’ve been doing at work. Today I learned (reviewed) concepts of typescript css continued Resources kokoa clone 3.

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 04
item.description: Challenge Tasks Day4 (July 7, 2022) kokoa clone #3.6 ~ #3.11 Challenge quiz posting a blog interview preparation Overview had an interview with a vfx studio and it doesn’t seem to go well. Everytime I have an interview, I can get to know more about myself though. Today I learned (reviewed) reviewed CSS basics and flexbox Resources kokoa clone 3.6 ~ 3.11

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 03
item.description: Challenge Tasks Day3 (July 6, 2022) kokoa clone #3.0 ~ #3.5 Challenge assignment posting a blog Overview busy today to finish tasks at work. Today I learned (reviewed) HTML forms Resources kokoa clone 3.0 ~ 3.5

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 02
item.description: Challenge Tasks Day2 (July 5, 2022) kokoa clone #2.3 ~ #2.11 Quiz posting a blog React Master Class #3.0 - #3.2 Overview It is hard to have time to focus on learning outside of work. Tagging #100dayofcode on twitter post, and then it seems like being read by someone else. still warming up with quizes, tomorrow will be first assignment day for challenge. Today I learned (reviewed) basic HTML tags head form id and classes semantic html etc Additional learning styled components recap : confusing.

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 01
item.description: Overview I’m starting a web development challenge with Nomadcoders(nomadcoders.co). This 10 weeks challenge is to review my JS knowledges and to start bootstrapping my ideas. I don’t think this would cover everything, but I’m just hoping that I can meet some people who can talk about programming and have fun. Today I learned (reviewed) basic understanding on HTML, CSS and JS environment setup Resources kokoa clone 1.5 - 1.
